data.name: MainForm.showtargtext.Text
data.value: Show target flag on single click

data.name: MainForm.queueTargets.Text
data.value: Queue Last Target and Target Self

data.name: MainForm.friendIncludePartyCheckBox.Text
data.value: Include party member in Friend List

data.name: Inspector.Status.ClickInspect
data.value: Click 'Inspect' to target an object in game

data.name: Inspector.Status.NotFound
data.value: Entity 0x{0:X} not found in world cache.

data.name: Dashboard.CoreEngine.ToolTip
data.value: Indicates the current version and status of the core TMRazor engine.

data.name: Dashboard.Diagnostics.ToolTip
data.value: Open the diagnostics panel to check system health and advanced metrics.

data.name: Dashboard.Welcome
data.value: Welcome back. All systems are operational.

data.name: Dashboard.Network.ToolTip
data.value: Shows whether the tool is successfully connected to the Ultima Online game client.

data.name: Dashboard.RecordVideo.ToolTip
data.value: Start or stop recording a video of the game window.

data.name: Dashboard.Screenshot.ToolTip
data.value: Take a screenshot of the current game window.

data.name: Dashboard.Language.ToolTip
data.value: Select the interface language for TMRazor.

data.name: Dashboard.OpenGallery.ToolTip
data.value: Open the folder where screenshots and videos are saved.

data.name: Journal.Filter.ToolTip
data.value: Search for specific keywords or names within the journal entries.

data.name: Journal.Description
data.value: Monitor in-game system and world messages

data.name: Journal.Clear.ToolTip
data.value: Remove all current entries from the journal display.

data.name: Journal.Export.ToolTip
data.value: Save the current journal log to a text file.

data.name: General.Patch.Encryption.ToolTip
data.value: Removes encryption from the client to allow the tool to read network traffic.

data.name: General.Action.DPSMeter.ToolTip
data.value: Toggle the Damage Per Second meter overlay.

data.name: General.Patch.Negotiate.ToolTip
data.value: Negotiates advanced features with the server (e.g., fast walk).

data.name: Hotkeys.PassThrough.ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, the key press is also sent to the game client.

data.name: Hotkeys.Add.ToolTip
data.value: Add a new hotkey for the selected action.

data.name: Hotkeys.Set.ToolTip
data.value: Click to start recording a new key combination.

data.name: PacketLogger.SelectPacket
data.value: Select a packet to inspect details

data.name: PacketLogger.Record.ToolTip
data.value: Start capturing incoming and outgoing packets.

data.name: PacketLogger.Clear.ToolTip
data.value: Clear the current list of captured packets.

data.name: PacketLogger.Filter.ToolTip
data.value: Filter the list by packet ID in hexadecimal format.

data.name: General.Patch.Stamina.ToolTip
data.value: Bypasses stamina checks for certain actions like pushing through mobs.

data.name: General.Patch.MultiClient.ToolTip
data.value: Allows multiple instances of the game client to run simultaneously.

data.name: General.Action.SpellGrid.ToolTip
data.value: Open the test spell grid window.

data.name: General.Action.Toolbar.ToolTip
data.value: Show/Hide the floating toolbar for quick access to agents and tools.

data.name: Options.SetBlade.ToolTip
data.value: Click and target a blade in your inventory to use for this automation.

data.name: Options.BoneCutter.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically cut bones into smaller pieces when found in corpses.

data.name: Options.BlockTradeRequests.ToolTip
data.value: Prevent other players from opening trade windows with you.

data.name: Options.AlwaysOnTop.ToolTip
data.value: Keep the TMRazor Improved window above all other windows.

data.name: Options.SetMount.ToolTip
data.value: Click and target your mount in the game world to assign it for auto-remounting.

data.name: Options.UiOpacity.ToolTip
data.value: Adjust the transparency level of the TMRazor Improved user interface.

data.name: Options.AutoScreenshotOnDeath.ToolTip
data.value: Take a screenshot of the game window automatically when your character dies.

data.name: Options.BlockPartyInvites.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically decline party invitations from other players.

data.name: Options.ForceWindowSize.ToolTip
data.value: Override the default Ultima Online game window size.

data.name: Options.AutoRemount.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically attempt to remount your assigned mount if you are dismounted.

data.name: Options.ScaleItems.ToolTip
data.value: Enable scaling of in-game item icons for better visibility.

data.name: Options.AutoCarver.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically use a blade on corpses within reach to harvest resources.

data.name: Options.Visuals.ShowIncomingDamage.ToolTip
data.value: Displays damage numbers over characters as they take hits.

data.name: Options.Visuals.IncomingNames.ToolTip
data.value: Shows the names of new players or NPCs that enter your screen range.

data.name: Options.Action.OverheadMessages.ToolTip
data.value: Toggle the overlay that displays custom system messages over your character.

data.name: Options.Visuals.HighlightTarget.ToolTip
data.value: Draws a visual indicator around your currently selected target.

data.name: Options.Visuals.ShowNames.ToolTip
data.value: Displays the name of players and NPCs directly above their heads in the game world.

data.name: Options.Action.TargetHP.ToolTip
data.value: Open or close the dedicated health status window for your current target.

data.name: Options.Action.FloatingToolbar.ToolTip
data.value: Toggle the small floating bar for quick agent and tool access.

data.name: Options.Visuals.ShowHealth.ToolTip
data.value: Shows a health bar or percentage for players and NPCs above their heads.

data.name: Skills.Action.ResetDelta.ToolTip
data.value: Reset all skill 'Delta' values to zero to start tracking new gains.

data.name: Skills.Action.CopyList.ToolTip
data.value: Copy the entire skill list with values to the clipboard in a tab-separated format.

data.name: Skills.ApplyAll.ToolTip
data.value: Apply the selected lock status to all skills in the list.

data.name: Skills.DisplayChanges.ToolTip
data.value: Toggle the visibility of the 'Delta' column, which shows skill gains since the last reset.

data.name: Skills.SetAllLocks.ToolTip
data.value: Set the lock status (Up, Down, or Locked) for all skills simultaneously.

data.name: SecureTrade.Monitor.Description
data.value: Monitor and control active trade sessions

data.name: SecureTrade.StartTradeHint
data.value: Start a trade in-game by dropping an item on a character

data.name: Gallery.Description
data.value: View and manage your in-game screenshots

data.name: Gallery.Empty.Hint
data.value: Take a screenshot in-game using the PrintScreen key or the assistant button

data.name: Gallery.Refresh.ToolTip
data.value: Scan the screenshots folder for new files.

data.name: Gallery.OpenFolder.ToolTip
data.value: Open the folder where screenshots are stored in Windows Explorer.

data.name: Scripting.Default.Python
data.value:
# Python script for TMRazor # Available objects: Player, Items, Mobiles, Misc
print('Hello from TMRazor!') print('HP:', Player.Hits, '/', Player.HitsMax)

data.name: Inspector.Status.ActionNotSupported
data.value: This control does not support direct actions.

data.name: Inspector.Status.SelectMapLocation
data.value: Select a location on the map...

data.name: Inspector.GumpList.Action.Inspect.ToolTip
data.value: Inspect this specific gump's controls and properties.

data.name: Inspector.GumpList.Action.Close.ToolTip
data.value: Close this gump in the game client.

data.name: Inspector.Gump.Refresh.ToolTip
data.value: Manually refresh or inspect the currently open gump.

data.name: Inspector.Gump.Action.Execute.ToolTip
data.value: Execute the action associated with this gump control (e.g., click a button).

data.name: Inspector.Map.Refresh.ToolTip
data.value: Refresh the player's position on the map.

data.name: Agents.Dress.Description
data.value: Manage and automatically equip sets of gear.

data.name: Agents.General.Enabled.ToolTip
data.value: Enable or disable this agent's functionality.

data.name: Agents.Vendor.Description
data.value: Manage automated buying and selling from NPCs.

data.name: Agents.Scavenger.Description
data.value: Automatically pick up items from the ground.

data.name: Agents.General.Add.ToolTip
data.value: Add a new item to the list by targeting it in the game world.

data.name: Agents.General.Clear.ToolTip
data.value: Remove all items from the list.

data.name: Agents.Friends.Description
data.value: Configure lists of friends and enemies for highlighting.

data.name: Agents.BandageHeal.Description
data.value: Automatically use bandages to heal yourself or others.

data.name: Agents.Restock.Description
data.value: Automatically restock supplies from a bank or container.

data.name: Agents.Targeting.Description
data.value: Configure advanced targeting logic and priorities.

data.name: Agents.General.Remove.ToolTip
data.value: Remove the selected item from the list.

data.name: Agents.AutoLoot.Description
data.value: Automatically move items from corpses to your backpack.

data.name: AutoLoot.SetContainer.ToolTip
data.value: Target a container in-game to be used as the loot destination.

data.name: AutoLoot.CloneList.ToolTip
data.value: Clone the currently selected AutoLoot list.

data.name: AutoLoot.Action.Edit.ToolTip
data.value: Edit properties for this loot item.

data.name: AutoLoot.ClearList.ToolTip
data.value: Remove all items from the current loot list.

data.name: AutoLoot.RemoveList.ToolTip
data.value: Remove the currently selected AutoLoot list.

data.name: AutoLoot.AddItem.ToolTip
data.value: Target an item in-game to add it to the loot list.

data.name: AutoLoot.Action.Remove.ToolTip
data.value: Remove this item from the loot list.

data.name: Agents.General.SetContainer.ToolTip
data.value: Target a container in the game world to be used by this agent.

data.name: Agents.General.AddItem.ToolTip
data.value: Target an item in-game to add its graphic and color to the list.

data.name: Agents.General.AddManual.ToolTip
data.value: Manually enter item details to add to the list.

data.name: Agents.General.Autostart.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically start this agent when the application or profile loads.

data.name: Agents.General.ClearList.ToolTip
data.value: Remove all entries from the current list.

data.name: Agents.Organizer.Error.NoContainers
data.value: Error: Set source and destination before starting.

data.name: Agents.General.ManualItemAdded
data.value: Manual item added. Edit ID and Color in the list.

data.name: Agents.General.WhileHidden.ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, the agent will continue to work even if your character is hidden (Hiding/Stealth).

data.name: Agents.AutoLoot.NoOpen.ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, the agent will not attempt to automatically open corpses. It will only loot those already opened by you or others.

data.name: Agents.BandageHeal.ShowHP.ToolTip
data.value: Displays the health percentage of the target directly over their character body in the game world.

data.name: Agents.Targeting.AutoQueue.ToolTip
data.value: Queues a target request if one is not immediately available, then executes it as soon as a target is found.

data.name: Agents.Targeting.RangeCheck.ToolTip
data.value: Ensures that potential targets are within a valid range before attempting to target them.

data.name: Agents.Targeting.SmartTarget.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically targets the most appropriate mobile based on proximity and notoriety (e.g., targets enemies first).

data.name: Agents.Organizer.Stack.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically stack items of the same type in the destination container.

data.name: Agents.Organizer.Loop.ToolTip
data.value: Continually run the organizer agent at the specified delay.

data.name: Agents.Organizer.CompleteMsg.ToolTip
data.value: Display a system message when the organization process is finished.

data.name: Agents.Organizer.OrganizeNow.ToolTip
data.value: Manually trigger the organization process immediately.

data.name: Agents.Restock.RestockNow.ToolTip
data.value: Manually trigger the restocking process immediately.

data.name: Agents.Vendor.CompareName.ToolTip
data.value: When matching items, also check if the item name matches exactly.

data.name: Agents.Vendor.SellEnabled.ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, the agent will automatically sell items from the Sell List when a vendor is opened.

data.name: Agents.Vendor.MaxSell.ToolTip
data.value: Limit the number of items sold in a single transaction.

data.name: Agents.Vendor.LogPurchases.ToolTip
data.value: Record all purchase actions in the activity log.

data.name: Agents.Vendor.BuyEnabled.ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, the agent will automatically buy items from the Buy List when a vendor is opened.

data.name: Options.PathFindingMaxRange.ToolTip
data.value: Maximum distance (in tiles) the pathfinding engine will scan to find a path.
